segment.source: Renders a navigation bar with a brand name and menu links styled as a row of tab buttons, one of which can be flagged active and is highlighted with aria-current; an optional call-to-action button sits at the end. Use it for: section or view switchers, app-like page navigation, category links where the current page must stay visible. Prefer 'Tabbed Content Panels' when content switches in place; this element links to separate pages.
